name: Brookville Sportsplex
description: Brookville Sportsplex is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Brookville, IN. There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: County Parks & Recreation
description: County Parks & Recreation is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Brookville, IN. There are 8 hard courts. 4 are outdoors and 4 are indoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to lights and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: Laurel Community Center
description: Come play pickleball at Laurel Community Center in Laurel, IN! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.

name: The Old Brookville High School
description: The Old Brookville High School is a place to play pickleball in Brookville, IN. There are 6 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The courts are free.
